_comment: Contract-B human-principal envelope cross-language canonicalization fixture. Both the Go side (vaultmind-oss internal/identity/envelope.CanonicalizeEnvelope) and the Rust side (agent-chat chat-core canonicalize_envelope) MUST produce the listed `canonical` bytes for the given `fields`, and sha256(canonical) MUST equal `sha256`. Vendored byte-identical into both repos; a drift fails CI on either side (the S3 dual-pin, same discipline as strict_verify_cross_language_vectors.json).

vectors.name: bridge_attested_chat
vectors.note: the frozen sample: a Bridge principal signs, vouching for a human, kind=chat. All 4 human-principal fields present.
